location: Rare drop from Large Oracle Envoy enemies, most easily farmed in the East Capital Rampart area of Leyndell, Royal Capital.
tactics: Rest at the East Capital Rampart grace and hunt the Large Oracle Envoys (tall, horn-wielding statue-like enemies) patrolling just south of it.
Drop rate is very low even with high Discovery — stack the Silver-Pickled Fowl Foot and Discovery-boosting talismans/gear before farming.
The same enemy type appears in Miquella's Haligtree, but they're stronger there and perched on tree branches, making that fight riskier for the same drop.
Only Large Oracle Envoys carry the horn — smaller Oracle Envoys do not drop it, despite occasional player reports otherwise.
lore: A long golden horn carried by the Oracle Envoys, far too heavy for a human hand to actually play as an instrument. Its sheer weight alone makes every swing land hard.

builds.name: Strength/Faith holy hybrid
builds.why: D-scaling Str, Dex, and Faith with a solid chunk of innate Holy damage, plus a ranged Bubble Shower skill, make it a flexible Faith-hybrid pick that can poke from range before closing in.
